uplink.description: TTN example: battery, temperature, distance, position=tilt -> action.motion.detected true
Synthetic: position=normal -> action.motion.detected false, negative temperature, distance
uplink._note: Oracle from reference wire format: battery 0x55=85; temp s16le(0x9C,0xFF)=0xFF9C=-100/10=-10.0; distance u16le(0xE8,0x03)=1000; position byte 0 -> normal -> detected false.

uplink.description: Synthetic: temperature-with-abnormal (0x83) and distance-with-alarming (0x84) status channels
uplink._note: Oracle: temp s16le(0x2C,0x01)=0x012C=300/10=30.0, abnormal byte 1 -> true; distance u16le(0x90,0x01)=400, alarming byte 1 -> true.

uplink.description: Error: unrecognized channel/type yields no recognized channels
